message:
refactor: remove redundant init locks and add quality fallback warning

- Remove fast_init_lock and quality_init_lock from VectorIndexCache (OnceLock
  already provides thread-safe initialization)
- Add warning log when quality embedding fails to fall back to Phase 1 results
- Fix clippy unnecessary_literal_bound lint in mock embedder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
